ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA-NeMo/NeMo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/NeMo
Language: python
A scalable generative AI framework built for researchers and developers working on Large Language Models, Multimodal, and Speech AI (Automatic Speech Recognition and Text-to-Speech)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/SkillSpector
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/SkillSpector
Language: python
Security scanner for AI agent skills. Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NanmiCoder/MediaCrawler
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NanmiCoder/MediaCrawler
Language: python
小红书笔记 | 评论爬虫、抖音视频 | 评论爬虫、快手视频 | 评论爬虫、B 站视频 ｜ 评论爬虫、微博帖子 ｜ 评论爬虫、百度贴吧帖子 ｜ 百度贴吧评论回复爬虫 | 知乎问答文章｜评论爬虫

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Panniantong/Agent-Reach
Language: python
Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
Language: python
AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
Language: python
LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。 LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost-free scheduled runs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aws/agent-toolkit-for-aws
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aws/agent-toolkit-for-aws
Language: python
Official, AWS-supported MCP servers, skills, and plugins to help AI agents build on AWS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bytedance/deer-flow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bytedance/deer-flow
Language: python
An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: calesthio/OpenMontage
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/calesthio/OpenMontage
Language: python
World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: interviewstreet/hiring-agent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/interviewstreet/hiring-agent

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
Language: python
817 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 6 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND, NIST AI RMF & MITRE F3 (Fight Fraud) · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 29 security domains · Apache 2.0

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opendatalab/MinerU

ns0:entry.ns0:title: xbtlin/ai-berkshire
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/xbtlin/ai-berkshire
Language: python
AI 时代的伯克希尔：基于 Claude Code 的价值投资研究框架。巴菲特·芒格·段永平·李录四大师方法论 + 多Agent并行研究。| AI-era Berkshire: a value investing research framework built on Claude Code. 4 masters' methodologies + multi-agent adversarial analysis.
